summary: 3 newsletters processed. 2 high-relevance for AI/LLM wiki (Google AI/Anthropic news, VAST Data GPU infrastructure), 1 medium (Netflix CPTO AI workforce).

newsletters.subject: Google Clones You, Meta Powers Anthropic, and Thinking Machines Opens the Vault
newsletters.reason: Covers three major AI industry developments: Google's AI cloning/personalization capabilities, Meta funding Anthropic, and Thinking Machines releasing significant resources. All three directly relevant to the wiki's coverage of major AI players and industry dynamics.

newsletters.subject: "You're wasting a lot of money": Exclusive Interview with VAST Data's Sven Breuner on why the data layer decides whether your GPUs earn their keep
newsletters.reason: Directly relevant to AI infrastructure wiki. Covers data layer optimization for GPU workloads in AI training/inference — a core topic for the wiki's infrastructure coverage. VAST Data is a major AI infrastructure company.

newsletters.subject: Netflix CPTO on AI and the future of product and tech roles | Elizabeth Stone
newsletters.reason: Covers AI's organizational impact on tech/product roles at Netflix. Relevant as industry context but not core LLM/agent technology. Could inform 'ai-industry-impact' or 'ai-workforce' concept pages.
